activities.title: Hang onto the pacer  no matter what
activities.description:
10' segments moving from D pace group ➡️ C2 ➡️ C1 ➡️ B2 ➡️ B1 ➡️ A.
Super proud of the last 10 minutes. Got dropped and made up 7s with no draft to get back up to A pacer.
Was going to just spin the legs but hit it hard

activities.description: Apparently watch got confused. Set it to buzz every 30s for a continuous swim, but looking at data it seems like it only captured lengths of about 50% of the first 11 minutes. Good continuous swim for aerobic recovery

activities.title: Group Ride: The HERD Thirsty Thursday
